name: CodeBlock
summary: Syntax-highlighted code block with a copy-to-clipboard button and snackbar feedback; use it to display source snippets — set `language` to match the curated highlight.js set (others fall back to plaintext).

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the (scrollable, focusable) code region.

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`

bestPractices: Use monospace fonts and high‑contrast theme colours for readability.
Prefer short snippets inline; extract long examples into files and link out to keep pages readable and fast.
Indicate language for syntax highlighting and assistive tech.
Avoid excessive horizontal scrolling; wrap long lines where possible or offer a copy action.
Keep code immutable in this component; use an editor widget for editable code.

Name the regions: `ariaLabel` labels the (keyboard-focusable, scrollable) code region; the copy button carries its own fixed label and a `copyLabel` tooltip. Copy feedback is honest — a successful copy shows a 'Copied' toast, a clipboard failure (or an insecure-origin/unsupported `navigator.clipboard`) shows a 'Copy failed' `role='alert'` toast rather than a false success.
